mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, amount, status, payment_type, payment_trade_no, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ordered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ordered_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paid_count, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paid_amount FROM orders
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, amount, status, payment_type, payment_trade_no, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{paymentType}, #{paymentTradeNo}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
